raise_justifications.desktop/macos/Desktop/Sources/FloatingCo: Agent completion presentation now follows the canonical terminal lifecycle used by PTT and chat.
Retiring the stale notch chat and settings hover chrome reduced this shared surface while preserving agent rows.
Idle notch clicks now route through the canonical main-chat authority while the owning window keeps hover geometry consistent.
Batch STT now starts independently and cancels screen OCR off the response-critical path within the owning turn manager.
Strict concurrency annotations (Ticket 14) add Sendable conformances and isolation qualifiers without changing runtime behavior.
